name: labelled-sql-injection
pr_body: Adds a helper that fetches a user record by email address.
diff:
diff --git a/src/users.py b/src/users.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/users.py
+++ b/src/users.py
@@ -10,3 +10,8 @@ class UserRepo:
     def __init__(self, conn):
         self.conn = conn
 
+    def find_by_email(self, email):
+        cur = self.conn.cursor()
+        sql = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '" + email + "'"
+        cur.execute(sql)
+        return cur.fetchone()
guidelines: Never construct SQL by string concatenation; use parameterised queries.

expected.note: SQL injection — email is user-controlled and concatenated into the query string instead of bound as a parameter.
